definition:
ἀν-αγγέλλω 
 [in LXX chiefly for נָגַד hi ;] 
  1. to bring back word, report (Æsch., Thuc., al.): Jhn.5:15 (WH, εἶπεν), Act.14:27 15:4, 2Co.7:7 
   2. Later, = ἀπαγγέλλω (MM, VGT, see word), to announce, declare (LXX; Cremer, 24): Mat.28:11 (WH, ἀπ-), Jhn.4:25 16:13-15, Act.19:18 20:20, 27 Rom.15:21, 1Pe.1:12, 1Jn.1:5.†
 (AS)
